$comment: Example LPDF_PAGE_BLEED_PAST_DIELINE finding (P-30). Emitted when the page's declared /BleedBox extends past the dieline polygon envelope. Distinct from LPDF_DIE_EXCESSIVE_BLEED (which is about content overhang) — P-30 catches a misconfigured bleed allowance that doesn't fit within the cutter region. ISO 32000-2:2020 §14.11.2 / ISO 19593-1 §5.3.
message: Page /BleedBox extends past the dieline polygon by 1.76mm — press-side bleed allocation does not fit inside the cutter region
